title: Fabric Seasons: BYG Compat
description: Oh The Biomes You'll Go compatibility for Fabric Seasons
body:
## Fabric Seasons: BYG Compat A simple mod that adds compatibility between Oh The Biomes You'll Go and Fabric Seasons.
### Description A handmade mod that remixes textures from BYG, adding visual seasonal changes for its biomes. This mod also adds crop compatibility for BYG crops, allowing them to have different growing speeds according to the current season. ### Seasonal Biomes
### Seasonal Crops
### Other Information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: [https://github.com/lucaargolo/fabric-seasons-byg-compat](https://github.com/lucaargolo/fabric-seasons-byg-compat) If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to call me on Discord @D4rk#0693 You can find me in the Cafeteria Development guild. [![](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/707435077679841350/embed.png?style=banner2&v=2)](https://discord.com/invite/G4PjhEf)
